decisions.title: Hybrid storage: UserDefaults + app Keychain
decisions.summary: Account metadata in UserDefaults, OAuth tokens in app-owned Keychain items keyed by email

decisions.title: Single 60s timer for polling + refresh
decisions.summary: Simplified from dual-timer design; keychain poll and usage refresh on same cycle

decisions.title: No OAuth refresh tokens
decisions.summary: Never attempt token refresh to avoid invalidating Claude Code's tokens; mark expired as stale

decisions.title: Summary+drill-down accordion UI
decisions.summary: Multi-account popover uses compact rows with expand-to-detail; single-account UI unchanged

decisions.title: Email as canonical account key
decisions.summary: Account identity resolved via /api/oauth/profile endpoint; email is stable unique identifier

decisions.title: Silent account detection
decisions.summary: New accounts added automatically without user confirmation; appears in popover on next open

decisions.title: Worst-case menubar aggregation
decisions.summary: Menubar shows highest utilization percentage across all active accounts
